arts.ttl: Club preparing to bank £150m as Arsenal, Liverpool & Man Utd eye wide-forward transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester United are reportedly among the clubs eyeing up a transfer deal for Bournemouth winger Antoine Semenyo this summer. The Cherries have had a fine season in the Premier League, and that inevitably means it looks like it’s going to be hard for them to keep their star names. arts.ttl: 10 players set to miss Arsenal vs Crystal Palace as Mikel Arteta sends message to Liverpool
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Oliver Glasner both promise to name strong teams in Premier League game with little riding on it beyond confirming Liverpool's long-inevitable title win as Cup clashes loom large

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's advice for Arsenal and Mikel Arteta ahead of Liverpool guard of honour
arts.sum: Arsenal may have to hand Liverpool a guard of honour when they clash in May but Sir Alex Ferguson previously made it clear that the tradition, even against a rival, should be stuck to

arts.ttl: Arsenal join Chelsea and Manchester United in race for forward with £30m release clause
arts.sum: Arsenal have joined Manchester United and Chelsea in expressing interest in signing Liam Delap from Ipswich Town this summer. Delap has been the silver lining in an otherwise tough season for Ipswich, whose Premier League relegation was effectively confirmed at the weekend. The Tractor Boys need maximum points from their final five games, alongside a […] The post Arsenal join Chelsea and Manchester United in race for forward with £30m release clause first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal risk losing out on Sverre Nypan deal as new transfer leader emerges
arts.sum: Gunners moved for Rosenborg starlet in January and had been expected to revisit their interest this summer

arts.ttl: New development: Chelsea move ahead of Liverpool & Arsenal in £50m transfer battle
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly moved into the lead in the race to sign £50m-rated Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen this summer. Liverpool and Arsenal have also been among Huijsen’s admirers, while there’s also mention of Real Madrid. That’s according to the Independent, who now state that Chelsea look to be emerging as the favourites for the talented […] The post New development: Chelsea move ahead of Liverpool & Arsenal in £50m transfer battle appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres sends Arsenal clear transfer message ahead of huge summer decision
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon centre-forward Viktor Gyokeres continued to show his class to Arsenal on Tuesday night after scoring in his team's Taca de Portugal semi-final against Rio Ave. Arsenal have been left light in attack during the second half of the season following injuries to Kai Havertz and Gabriel Jesus, and Gyokeres' ability to find the back of the net and fire his side to a final will send a clear message to the club's decision-makers as they work out how to rectify the situation in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Sverre Nypan: 'Next Martin Odegaard' close to deciding between Arsenal, Aston Villa & Man City
arts.sum: Rosenborg's star central midfielder Sverre Nypan will be on his way out of Norway's top flight this summer.

arts.ttl: Revisiting Palace’s FA Cup semi-final history
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are preparing for their seventh-ever FA Cup semi-final, as they prepare to take on Aston Villa at Wembley on Saturday 26th April (17:15 BST).

arts.ttl: Exclusive column: Arsenal hopeful over midfielder transfer, new Thomas Partey development & more
arts.sum: Arsenal don’t need to fear PSG The Champions League semi-final against PSG is looming large for Arsenal. In all honesty, it’s pretty much impossible to think about anything else.
